metadata.title: ceylonm - Modern Requirements Management Platform
metadata.description: ceylonm is a modern requirements management platform that helps teams efficiently manage project requirements, track progress, and collaborate. Supports version views, requirement categorization, priority management, and more.

hero.title: Let AI Handle Your Requirements Workflow
hero.subtitle: Ceylon automatically transforms user feedback into requirements documents, achieving an intelligent closed loop for software iteration. Discover new requirements from feedback and keep your product evolving.

aiFeedback.title: Intelligent Feedback Processing
aiFeedback.description: Automatically analyze user feedback and intelligently extract requirement highlights into your documents. No manual sorting needed—let every user voice drive product improvement.

smartIteration.title: Automated Iteration Loop
smartIteration.description: Integrate with AI tools to automatically track requirement implementation status. From user feedback to requirement updates to version iteration, form a complete automated workflow.

smartImport.title: Smart Requirement Import
smartImport.description: Generate multiple requirement proposals from user feedback, presented in tables for your selection. Flexibly accept, modify, or reject—make requirement decisions smarter.

aiCli.title: Local AI Integration
aiCli.description: CLI tool designed for local AI agents. Works with OpenClaw, Cursor, and other tools to automatically manage requirements. Let your AI assistant directly operate requirement documents for end-to-end automation.

cli.title: CLI Tool Built for Local AI
cli.description: Once installed, your AI assistant can directly read and modify requirement documents. Integrate with various AI tools for fully automated requirement management.
